name: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR tool
description: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire integration. We provide a structured onboarding checklist instead of manual checklists and spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire integration.
